subject: [PATCH v2 3/6] fuse: don't require /dev/fuse fd to be kept open during mount

reviews.author: Joanne Koong
reviews.summary: Provided background information on the asynchronous nature of FUSE_INIT and its implications for the patch.

2026-03-17.patch_summary: The patch proposes to relax the requirement that the /dev/fuse file descriptor be kept open during mount.
